The '''Obsidian Sword''' was a weapon crafted by the [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarians]] from [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar's]] sharpest obsidian, and were similar to the [[Obsidian Lance]]. These [[Sword/Legends|swords]] were the favored weapons of their creators, who would specially carve the hilt of the blades. This meant that no blade was similar and made each sword unique.

==Behind the scenes==
The Obsidian Sword appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
